description: Tracks product-building and design tool repositories from GitHub signals.

items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.
A modern file manager that helps users organize their files and folders.

ShareX is a free and open-source application that enables users to capture or record any area of their screen with a single keystroke. It also supports uploading images, text, and various file types to a wide range of destinations.

A next.js web application that integrates AI capabilities with draw.io diagrams. This app allows you to create, modify, and enhance diagrams through natural language commands and AI-assisted visualization.
Agentic AI Infrastructure for magnifying HUMAN capabilities.

PlainApp is an open-source app that lets you securely manage your phone from a web browser. Access files, media, contacts, SMS, calls, and more through a simple, easy-to-use interface on your desktop.
Terminal session manager for AI coding agents. One TUI for Claude, Gemini, OpenCode, Codex, and more.
小遥搜索，听懂你的话、看懂你的图，用AI找到本地任何文件。让搜索像聊天一样简单。XiaoyaoSearch: Understands your words, reads your images, finds any local file with AI. Making search as easy as chatting.
Deck is a modern, native, privacy-first clipboard manager for macOS.
Atom Agent, automate your workflows by talking to an AI — and let it remember, search, and handle tasks like a real assistant
Transform your Claude Code terminal with atomic precision statusline. Features flexible layouts, real-time cost tracking, MCP monitoring, prayer times, and beautiful themes.
njt (npm jump to): a quick navigation tool for npm packages
Search your Claude Code sessions, Codex history, GitHub stars, and 50+ sources — locally, instantly. Your AI agents can search too.
Surgical context engineering with a nice UI, Windows, Mac, Linux, BSD, anywhere where python & Qt run

The definitive Microsoft 365 Copilot prompt library for business teams. 400+ prompts for Office apps, Copilot Studio, security operations, and enterprise deployment. Battle-tested in production environments
